settings.heading: Choose your program
settings.subheading: Every plan includes a 14-day free trial. No credit card required.

settings.heading: Built by athletes, for athletes
settings.body: Zenith was founded in 2018 by a team of elite coaches and sports scientists who believed that world-class training should be accessible to everyone. We combine cutting-edge exercise science with real-world coaching to help you reach your peak.

settings.quote: After 3 months on the Pro program I hit a personal best deadlift and dropped 8% body fat. The coaching is elite — these coaches genuinely care about your results.
settings.author: Marcus T.

settings.quote: I was skeptical about online coaching but Zenith completely changed my perspective. The workout plans adapt to my schedule and the nutrition guidance is practical — not just generic advice.
settings.author: Priya S.

settings.heading: Join the movement
settings.subheading: Get training tips, new arrivals, and exclusive member offers — straight to your inbox.

settings.heading: Pick up where you left off
